name: Noodle Surprise
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Cook noodles until tender; drain.
3. Saute onion and mushrooms in oil until vegetables are soft and seeds are crisp.
4. Combine drained noodles and sautéed veggies. Stir in cheese, eggs, yogurt, and seasonings.
5. Transfer mixture into an oiled baking dish. Top with breadcrumbs and additional cheese.
6. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes or until the casserole is firm. SERVES: 4
